type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The flaring volumes increased from 812.6 e3m3 in 2019 to 1,344.300 e3m3 in 2020. The combusted fuel volumes also increased from 112,407.7 e3m3 in 2019 to 316,594.1 e3m3 in 2020.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The facility consumed 935,826 kg of chemical EMBR17874A, which contains 20% methanol, resulting in a significant increase in methanol emissions between 2019 and 2020.
